backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all core data types (Session, Document, Message, Channel, Sticker, etc.) and backend API for an RPG session management platform, including blob storage mixin and authorization mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining old and new actor state shapes and a `run` function to migrate stable data between schema versions, handling sessions, documents, messages, communities, and related entities.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs and titles to their relevant frontend files, component dependencies, and test IDs for community hub navigation, CommunityPage layout, and banner customization.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary catalog describing the purpose and key details of each frontend source file across the React application.
frontend/docs/regression-test-plan-playe: Regression test plan covering player document creation, file/image uploads, privacy toggles, disabled states, error handling, and preview markup rendering for the player document feature.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, sidebar, charts, and UI components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app with an early inline script to apply the dark theme class from localStorage before render to prevent flash-of-unstyled-content.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that manages authentication via Internet Identity, user profile setup, session context (join/leave), and renders either LobbyPage or SessionPage based on state.
frontend/src/components/app/AppErrorBoun: React class-based error boundary that catches unhandled errors and displays a fallback UI with options to reload or clear local data and reload.
frontend/src/components/app/StartupFailu: Full-screen error UI displayed when the app fails to initialize, offering reload and clear-local-data-then-reload actions.
frontend/src/components/chat/ChannelChat: Chat view for a specific session channel that handles message display, sending text/roll commands/GIFs/stickers, image uploads, auto-scroll, and reply targeting.
frontend/src/components/chat/ChatMessage: Renders a single chat message bubble supporting text, sticker, and GIF content, with an inline emoji reaction picker and avatar display.
frontend/src/components/chat/StickerMana: Panel UI for managing locally stored stickers, with tabs to view/delete existing stickers and upload new ones via StickerUploadArea.
frontend/src/components/chat/StickerPick: Popup panel that displays the user's local sticker library in a grid and emits a selected sticker back to the parent on click.
frontend/src/components/chat/StickerUplo: A drag-and-drop/click-to-upload area for sticker images that processes the file using `processImageForSticker` and calls `onStickerProcessed` with the result, showing loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/communities/Bann: A dialog for customizing a community's banner, allowing users to upload an image and set banner color, accent color, and font, then save via a mutation that calls `actor.updateBannerSettings`.
frontend/src/components/communities/Chat: A placeholder component for the community chat tab that renders a blurred mock chat UI overlaid with a 'Coming Soon' message indicating private messaging is not yet available.
frontend/src/components/communities/Comm: Displays a community as a card with a banner/cover image, icon, name, description, and action buttons to open or hide the community, using theme colors for styling.
A form component for creating or editing a community, managing fields like name, description, privacy, join type, images, sub-places, and theme, notifying the parent of changes via `onChange`.
Renders a live preview card of a community's appearance using the current form data, applying theme colors, fonts, and images.
frontend/src/components/communities/Crea: A dialog that wraps `CommunityForm` and `CommunityThemePreview` to allow users to create a new community, with validation, submission handling, and a simulated backend call.
frontend/src/components/communities/Drag: A tab bar component that supports drag-and-drop reordering of tabs, with visual indicators for active tab and drag state, and an optional accent color.
frontend/src/components/communities/fiel: A collapsible form section for advanced community theme customization, including primary/accent color pickers, background presets, and contrast warnings.
A form component for uploading and previewing community cover, icon, and banner images, with validation and upload progress feedback.
A form editor component that allows adding, editing, and removing up to 3 custom join questions for a community. Renders text inputs with add/remove controls and enforces the 3-question maximum.
A form editor component for managing up to 5 community sub-places, each with a name input and a type selector (Chat, Documents, RPG). Enforces a minimum of 1 and maximum of 5 sub-places.
frontend/src/components/communities/Home: Displays a community's post feed with a post creation form (supporting text and image uploads) and auto-refreshing post list, requiring authentication to post.
frontend/src/components/communities/Post: Renders a single community post card showing the author's avatar/name (fetched by principal), timestamp, text content, and optional image.
frontend/src/components/communities/TabP: A dialog for managing which community members (by principal ID) have permission to reorder tabs, with grant and revoke actions.
A placeholder UI component displayed for unimplemented community tabs, showing an icon, tab name, description, and a 'Coming Soon' badge.
frontend/src/components/docs/DocumentCom: Displays a comment thread for a document, allowing authenticated users to add comments and hosts/owners to delete them. Uses React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and deleting comments.
frontend/src/components/docs/DocumentCon: Renders a document's content as a preview by tokenizing it into text, image, and file segments and displaying each appropriately. Fetches associated images and files to resolve embedded references like [IMAGE:id] and [FILE:id].
frontend/src/components/docs/DocumentEdi: A full document editor view supporting content editing, saving, image uploads (with title dialog), and file attachments. Hosts can edit and upload; the view also embeds the comments section and a content preview toggle.
frontend/src/components/docs/ImageUpload: A modal dialog for selecting and uploading an image file (max 10MB, jpg/png/gif/webp) with an optional title field. Validates file type and size before invoking the provided upload callback.
frontend/src/components/docs/PlayerDocum: A rich document editor component for player documents that supports markdown content editing, file/image uploads, visibility toggling, and a preview mode, with save and unsaved-change tracking.
frontend/src/components/profile/Avatar.t: A reusable avatar component that displays a user image or falls back to initials, supporting three size variants.
frontend/src/components/profile/ProfileP: A profile picture upload section that allows users to select, preview, and remove a PNG/JPG image with upload progress feedback.
frontend/src/components/profile/QuickCha: A dialog for setting a locally-stored quick chat profile with a display name and avatar image, including save and clear functionality.
frontend/src/components/session/ChannelM: Provides dialogs for creating, renaming, and deleting session channels, supporting both controlled and uncontrolled open states.
frontend/src/components/session/Document: Provides dialogs for creating, renaming, deleting, and toggling the lock state of session documents, with optional callback on document creation.
frontend/src/components/session/HostSess: Provides a dropdown menu component for hosts to export (download) or import (upload) session data as JSON files, with confirmation dialog before importing.
frontend/src/components/session/MembersC: Renders dialogs and dropdown menu items for creating, renaming, and deleting members channels within a session, restricted to channel owners.
frontend/src/components/session/PlayerDo: Provides dialogs and a dropdown menu for creating, renaming, deleting, and toggling visibility of player-owned documents within a session.
Displays a dialog listing all player documents in a session with options to select or create new ones, showing private status and ownership info.
frontend/src/components/session/SessionD: Displays a dialog for listing, creating, renaming, and deleting session-level documents, allowing the user to open a document directly from the list.
frontend/src/components/session/SessionS: Renders a collapsible sidebar for a session showing host channels and members channels, with controls to create channels (host only), select channels, and access profile/settings popovers.
frontend/src/components/settings/PreLobb: Settings view displayed before joining a session, allowing users to toggle theme, set a background image, change default nickname, manage profile picture, and upload/clear a session template.
frontend/src/components/settings/UIScale: A popover component with a slider and numeric input for adjusting the UI scale percentage (10–200%), persisting the value via the preferences hook.
frontend/src/config/polling.ts: Exports named polling interval constants (in milliseconds) for messages, lists, session info, and document content used across the app.
React context provider that loads, persists, and exposes user preferences (theme, background, etc.), automatically applying dark-mode class changes to the document.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) backend actor via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
Hook that monitors the actor query state and sets a failure flag if initialization errors or exceeds a 15-second timeout, used to surface startup failures to the UI.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommunityImageUplo: Hook that handles uploading an image file as an ExternalBlob, tracking upload progress and errors, and returning the direct URL of the uploaded image.
frontend/src/hooks/useDocumentComments.t: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, adding, deleting, and updating comments on a document, polling every 5 seconds and invalidating the cache on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useDocumentFiles.ts: Provides React Query hooks for listing document file references, fetching a single file reference, and uploading a new file to a document with cache invalidation on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useDocumentImages.ts: Provides React Query hooks for listing document images and adding images to both session documents and player documents via actor mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state to React components.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStickers.ts: Manages local sticker data using localStorage-backed utilities, exposing load, add, and remove operations with React state.
frontend/src/hooks/usePlayerDocuments.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on player documents, including listing, creating, renaming, deleting, editing, and toggling visibility.
frontend/src/hooks/usePolling.ts: A simple hook that runs a callback on a fixed interval using setInterval, with support for enabling/disabling polling.
frontend/src/hooks/usePreferences.ts: Re-exports the usePreferences hook from PreferencesContext for backwards compatibility.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuickChatProfile.t: Manages a quick chat profile stored in local storage, exposing load, save, and clear operations with React state.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessionData.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching session, channels, members channels, and messages data, plus mutations for creating, renaming, and deleting members channels.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessionDocuments.t: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on session documents, including listing, fetching, creating, renaming, deleting, and editing.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserDisplayName.ts: Fetches a user's display name from their profile via the actor, falling back to a shortened principal string if unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving the caller's and other users' profiles, including removing a profile picture.
frontend/src/hooks/useViewportHeight.ts: Custom React hook that tracks and returns the current viewport height in pixels, listening to resize, orientation change, and visual viewport events for accurate mobile support.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system using OKLCH colors, and provides layout utility classes for session pages, chat views, and Amino-style message bubbles.
frontend/src/lib/clearLocalAppData.ts: Utility function that removes specific app-related localStorage keys and clears sessionStorage to reset local application data.
frontend/src/lib/colorContrast.ts: Provides WCAG-based color contrast utilities including luminance calculation, contrast ratio computation, and a helper that warns when text/background color pairs fail the AA 4.5:1 threshold.
frontend/src/lib/communityTheme.ts: Defines default community theme values, font and background preset options, and helper functions to apply a CommunityTheme to a DOM element or generate card border styles.
frontend/src/lib/documentFileMarkers.ts: Utilities for creating, parsing, inserting, and removing [FILE:id:filename] markers within document content strings.
frontend/src/lib/documentImageMarkers.ts: Utilities for creating, parsing, inserting, and removing [IMAGE:id:caption] markers within document content strings.
frontend/src/lib/documentPreviewMarkup.t: React utilities for tokenizing document content and rendering inline markup including spoiler text, underlines, and line-level prefixes like centered, big, heading, and tiny text.
frontend/src/lib/gifUrlValidation.ts: Provides validation for direct GIF URLs (must end with .gif) and a helper to extract the first GIF URL found within a text string.
frontend/src/lib/imageValidation.ts: Validates image file type (PNG/JPG) and size (max 5MB), and provides helpers to convert a File to a Uint8Array or create an object URL preview.
frontend/src/lib/myCommunitiesHiddenStor: Manages a localStorage-persisted set of hidden community IDs with functions to load, save, add, remove, and clear entries.
frontend/src/lib/preferencesStorage.ts: Handles loading, saving, and resetting user preferences (theme, background image, nickname, UI scale) in localStorage, with clamping of the scale value to a valid range.
frontend/src/lib/quickChatProfileStorage: Manages localStorage persistence for a quick-chat profile (display name and avatar data URL), including validation of structure, data URL format, and size limits.
frontend/src/lib/rollCommand.ts: Validates dice roll command patterns (e.g., 2d6+3), checking for required 'd' notation and allowed characters, returning a validation result object.
frontend/src/lib/sessionExportFile.ts: Provides utilities to create, download, and parse versioned JSON export files for session data, including validation of format and version compatibility.
frontend/src/lib/sessionStorage.ts: Handles persisting and retrieving the current session context (sessionId, nickname, isHost) in localStorage.
frontend/src/lib/stickerImageProcessor.t: Processes uploaded image files into 128x128 PNG stickers via canvas cropping and validates size limits, also provides a helper to convert data URLs to Uint8Array.
frontend/src/lib/stickerStorage.ts: Manages a localStorage-backed collection of user stickers with load, save, add, remove, and clear operations, enforcing a 50-sticker maximum.
Stores and retrieves a single SessionExport template in localStorage, with a validation helper to check the expected data shape.
frontend/src/lib/time.ts: Formats a nanosecond bigint timestamp into a human-readable time string, showing time-only for today and date+time for older timestamps.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CommunitiesHubPage.ts: Renders a communities hub with discover and my-communities tabs, search, community creation, and navigation into individual CommunityPage views, with hidden-community filtering via localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityPage.tsx: Displays a single community's page with draggable tabs, banner customization, tab permissions, and fetches posts and host/permission status via React Query and the backend actor.
frontend/src/pages/LobbyPage.tsx: Provides host and join session forms with optional template application on creation, pre-filling nicknames from user preferences, and delegating to onSessionJoined on success.
frontend/src/pages/SessionPage.tsx: Main session page component that manages view state (channel, player document, session document), renders the sidebar and appropriate content view, and handles navigation between channels, documents, and the communities hub.
frontend/src/types/community.ts: TypeScript type definitions for community-related data structures including Community, CommunityTheme, SubPlace, and CommunityFormData with privacy, join, and layout options.
frontend/src/types/session.ts: TypeScript type definitions for session-related entities including Session, Channel, Message, Document, PlayerDocument, ImageReference, and related request/export types.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file recording the current version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features for the ICP/Motoko app's Communities tab.
